mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DataDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DataDate, Data1, Data2, Data3, Data4, Data5, Data6, Data7, Data8, Data9, Data10, Data11, Data12, Data13, Data14, Data15, Data16 FROM ${tableName} WHERE DataDate BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND SECOND(DataDate) = 0 ORDER BY DataDate ASC
